business.name: Jake the Snake Pipe & Drain
business.tagline: When your pipes are in trouble, call the Snake

hero.headline: When pipes back up, *the Snake* shows up
hero.subheadline: Mainline clogs cleared in 30 minutes or less — that's not a promise, that's our track record.

services_section.label: WHAT WE CLEAR
services_section.heading: Every pipe, every drain, every backup
services_section.subheading: From kitchen sinks to mainline disasters — we handle what's flowing wrong

services.title: Mainline Sewer Backup
services.description: When the whole house backs up, we bring the heavy-duty equipment. Most clears done in under an hour.

services.title: Kitchen & Bathroom Drains
services.description: Sink won't drain? Tub backing up? We clear it fast — usually 5-15 minutes per drain.

services.title: Emergency Drain Service
services.description: Flooding basement? We answer the emergency line and get there when you need us most.

services.title: Septic System Service
services.description: Full septic maintenance and repairs to keep your system flowing properly year-round.

about.heading: New Haven's go-to drain team
about.body: We're the New Haven septic and drain team that shows up ready to work. Real trucks, real equipment, real results.

reviews.name: Inez W.
reviews.text: Very professional young man who cleared my drain in just 5-15 minutes. Quick and reliable service — would call again.

reviews.name: Marie E.
reviews.text: Daryl is a life saver! Had pipes clogged for 3 days. Another company ripped me off and didn't fix it. A friend recommended Jake the Snake and they actually solved the problem.

reviews.name: Rosalyn M.
reviews.text: Mainline was backed up completely. Two gentlemen arrived and in less than 30 minutes I was doing laundry again! Professional work.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving New Haven County
service_areas.subheading: Emergency service throughout the greater New Haven area

cta.heading: Pipes backing up? Call the Snake now
cta.body: Don't wait for the flood — we answer the emergency line and show up with the right equipment to clear your drains fast.
